23111 Bioclogy (Theory) Paper 1
JULY, 2024 Time: 2 Hours
NAME: ... e Adm No: .........
Class: .......cccocevevnenenn....... Signature: ................ >31/1 Bioloev PPL- Theo
Tuesday, 9" July, 2024
Afternoon
Time: 2.00pm — 4.00pm
Instructions to Candidates
a) Write your name and Admission number in the spaces provided above.
b) Sign and write the date of examination in the spaces provided above
¢) Answer ALL the questions in the spaces provided below each question.
d) This paper consists of 31 questions only.
e) Answer all the questions in the spaces provided.
Al working MUST be clearly shown where necessary.
g) This paper consists of 11 printed pages. Candidates should check the question paper to
ascertain that all the pages are printed as indicated and that no questions are missing.
FOR EXAMINER’S USE ONLY
--
1
